cases.prompt: Claude Code on the web 쓰는데 매 세션마다 의존성 설치되게 SessionStart hook 만들어줘.

assertions.text: The agent creates a SessionStart hook at .claude/hooks/session-start.sh.
The hook installs dependencies idempotently on every session.
The hook uses a marker to short-circuit when setup has already run.

cases.prompt: Set up a startup hook so tests and linters work on every cloud session.

assertions.text: The agent creates an env-aware bootstrap hook so tests and linters work on cloud sessions.
The agent produces a .claude/hooks/session-start.sh with idempotent install logic.
